content: Extract generic StreamingProgressChip from HashRepairChip; rewire closet chip to use it (no behaviour change)
Backend M.1 — new POST /api/v1/closet/marketplace/backfill/stream (NDJSON, sibling endpoint for back-compat)
Frontend M.4 — marketplaceStore gains backfillProgress + browseProgress snapshots + drive methods
Frontend M.5 — wire Marketplace 'Sync from closet' button to streaming + show chip; opt-in stream for browse
i18n + lint sweep + smoke test (curl backend, screenshot frontend)
Bug fix: abort-clears-slot race on rapid location/filter changes — dropped upfront invalidate, added seen-IDs prune-on-done
